# SECTION 4 — Structural Diagrams & Schematics

## 4.1 Logic Family Classification Tree

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[DIGITAL LOGIC FAMILIES] --> B[BJT BASED FAMILIES]
    A --> C[MOS BASED FAMILIES]
    A --> D[GAAS BASED FAMILIES]

    B --> B1[RTL - Resistor Transistor Logic]
    B --> B2[DTL - Diode Transistor Logic]
    B --> B3[TTL - Transistor Transistor Logic]
    B --> B4[ECL - Emitter Coupled Logic]
    B --> B5[IIL - Integrated Injection Logic]

    B3 --> B3a[Standard TTL 74xx]
    B3 --> B3b[Low Power TTL L]
    B3 --> B3c[Schottky TTL S]
    B3 --> B3d[Advanced Schottky AS]
    B3 --> B3e[Advanced Low Power Schottky ALS]

    C --> C1[PMOS]
    C --> C2[NMOS]
    C --> C3[CMOS Complementary MOS]

    C3 --> C3a[Standard CMOS 4000 series]
    C3 --> C3b[High Speed CMOS 74HC]
    C3 --> C3c[Advanced CMOS 74AC]
    C3 --> C3d[Low Voltage CMOS 74LVC at 3.3V]
    C3 --> C3e[Advanced Low Voltage CMOS 74ALVC]
```

## 4.2 Voltage Transfer Characteristic (VTC) Regions — Block Architecture Flow

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph REGION_A [REGION A  V_in BELOW V_IL]
        A1[Input Logic 0 Region] --> A2[NMOS OFF]
        A2 --> A3[PMOS ON]
        A3 --> A4[Output Pulled to V_OH]
        A4 --> A5[Output Logic 1]
    end

    subgraph REGION_B [REGION B  V_IL to V_IH  TRANSITION]
        B1[Both Transistors Partially ON] --> B2[High Gain Region]
        B2 --> B3[Slope of VTC less than minus 1]
        B3 --> B4[Output Switches Abruptly]
    end

    subgraph REGION_C [REGION C  V_in ABOVE V_IH]
        C1[Input Logic 1 Region] --> C2[NMOS ON]
        C2 --> C3[PMOS OFF]
        C3 --> C4[Output Pulled to V_OL]
        C4 --> C5[Output Logic 0]
    end

    A5 --> B1
    B4 --> C1
```

## 4.3 Threshold Voltage Definition Map (Functional Block Diagram)

```mermaid
graph TD
    P[VOLTAGE TRANSFER CHARACTERISTIC VTC OF A GATE] --> Q[FOUR KEY POINTS MARKED ON VTC]
    Q --> R1[V_IL max Input LOW voltage]
    Q --> R2[V_IH min Input HIGH voltage]
    Q --> R3[V_OL max Output LOW voltage]
    Q --> R4[V_OH min Output HIGH voltage]
    P --> S[DERIVED METRICS]
    S --> T1[N_ML Noise Margin LOW equals V_IL minus V_OL]
    S --> T2[N_MH Noise Margin HIGH equals V_OH minus V_IH]
    S --> T3[V_th Switching Threshold equals point where V_in equals V_out]
    S --> T4[Logic Swing equals V_OH minus V_OL]
    S --> T5[Forbidden Width equals V_IH minus V_IL]
```

## 4.4 CMOS Inverter Schematic (Conceptual Block Architecture)

```mermaid
graph TD
    VDD[V_DD SUPPLY RAIL] --> PCH[PMOS TRANSISTOR PULL UP NETWORK]
    IN[INPUT VOLTAGE V_in] --> PCH
    IN --> NCH[NMOS TRANSISTOR PULL DOWN NETWORK]
    PCH --> OUT[OUTPUT NODE V_out]
    NCH --> OUT
    NCH --> GND[GND SUPPLY RAIL]

    PCH -. When V_in LOW .-> STATE1[PMOS ON, NMOS OFF, Output pulled to V_OH]
    PCH -. When V_in HIGH .-> STATE2[PMOS OFF, NMOS ON, Output pulled to V_OL]
    PCH -. When V_in near V_th .-> STATE3[Both in saturation, Short circuit current flows, Switching Threshold]
```
